descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes winger Jason Phillips leads Centennial Cup tournament scoring with four goals and five assists before final game against Humboldt Broncos.
descriptionLong: On the eve of the Centennial Cup national junior-A hockey final in Humboldt, Saskatchewan, Richmond Sockeyes winger Jason Phillips has emerged as the tournament's leading scorer with four goals and five assists through four games. Phillips was named to the all-star team at the awards banquet and is positioned to win most valuable player honors if the Sockeyes defeat the host Humboldt Broncos in the championship game.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes' Phillips Positioned for Cup Glory
